content:
Certainly! Here's a summary of my background:

I am Rohan, an AI Engineer based in Bangalore, India, with 2 years of experience in AI development. I specialize in deploying AI utilities efficiently and have a strong focus on prompt engineering, including areas like Red Teaming. I hold a Bachelor of Technology degree from SRM Institute of Science and Technology, graduated in 2024.

My professional experience includes working as an AI Prompt Engineer at NVIDIA, where I contributed to projects involving Dense Captioning and Visual Question Answering. Additionally, I am currently serving as an Entrepreneur in Residence at TiHAN-IIT Hyderabad, working on navigation systems using Linux and ROS.

I'm passionate about building innovative, user-friendly AI applications and constantly exploring new technologies. If you'd like, I can share more about my specific skills or projects!

I've displayed my Resume to the right, which covers my educational background, experience, and skills. If you'd like to know more about any specific part or have questions about my work, feel free to ask!
